background.text: a web provider is configured with URL "https://gemini.google.com/app"

scenarios.name: Panel navigates the web provider to the Gemini URL on first show

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web provider has navigated to "https://gemini.google.com/app"

scenarios.name: User can complete Google sign-in via system authentication session

steps.text: the panel is visible
the user is not signed in to Google
the user initiates Google sign-in
jarizz presents a system authentication session for Google sign-in
after sign-in completes the user is signed in to Google in the panel

scenarios.name: System authentication session can reuse an existing Google account

steps.text: the panel is visible
the user is not signed in to Google in the panel
jarizz presents a system authentication session
the session can use an existing signed-in Google account from the system browser
after sign-in completes the user is signed in to Google in the panel

scenarios.name: Hiding and showing the panel does not reload the web provider

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web provider navigation count is "1"

scenarios.name: Google session persists after the app is restarted

steps.text: the user is signed in to Google inside the panel
the user quits the app
the user launches the app
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the user is signed in to Google inside the panel

scenarios.name: Panel shows an error message when the network is unavailable

steps.text: the network is unavailable
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the panel displays "No network connection — check your internet and try again"

scenarios.name: Web provider uses persistent session storage

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web provider uses persistent session storage

scenarios.name: Web provider handles new windows inside the app

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web provider handles new windows inside the app

scenarios.name: Passkey sign-in works through system authentication session

steps.text: the panel is visible
the user is not signed in to Google
the user initiates passkey sign-in
jarizz presents a system authentication session that supports passkeys
after sign-in completes the user is signed in to Google in the panel

scenarios.name: Web provider system auth session is non-ephemeral

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web provider auth session is not ephemeral

scenarios.name: Gemini input field is focused when the panel becomes visible

steps.text: Gemini is loaded and the input field is present
the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the Gemini input field has focus

scenarios.name: Web provider focuses the input field when the panel is shown

steps.text: the user presses the global hotkey "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"
the web provider focuses the input field on show
